title: Hakea pagna
taxonomy: Hakea pagna is a species of shrub or small tree that belongs to the plant family Proteaceae. This family is characterized by its unique flowers and seeds, and it includes a wide variety of species found primarily in Australia and New Zealand. The Proteaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies, with Hakea pagna likely being classified within the subfamily Lepeostrogoideae.
